title: Test 2
teaser: Generated from prompt: We're new recruits in the city's fire department facing our first crises...

guidelines.world: Nestled in the misty hills of an ancient forest, the elite boarding school of Eldridge Academy stands as a beacon of knowledge and tradition. However, beneath its prestigious facade, the school is a labyrinth of hidden secrets and dangerous alliances. As a new teacher, you must navigate the treacherous waters of academia while uncovering the mysteries that threaten the very foundation of Eldridge.
rules: The school operates under a strict code of conduct, but many students and faculty have their own agendas.
Magic is real but hidden, and only a few select students and faculty are aware of its existence.
The school's history is intertwined with ancient secrets that some would kill to protect.
conflicts: Balancing teaching responsibilities with investigating the school's secrets.
Deciding whom to trust among students and faculty with conflicting interests.
Confronting the hidden magical forces that threaten the school.
decisions: Choosing whether to prioritize teaching duties or investigating suspicious activities.
Deciding whether to ally with students or faculty in uncovering secrets.
Managing limited resources to protect the school from hidden threats.

storyElements.name: Headmaster Aldric
storyElements.role: The enigmatic headmaster who seems to know more than he lets on.
storyElements.instructions: Headmaster Aldric can provide cryptic hints about the school's history but is reluctant to divulge too much.
facts: He uses he/him pronouns and is motivated by a desire to protect the school's legacy.
He has been the headmaster for over 20 years and is respected by most faculty.
Rumors suggest he has ties to an ancient magical order.

storyElements.name: Lila
storyElements.role: A bright but secretive student who seems to be involved in something dangerous.
storyElements.instructions: Lila can offer insights into student activities but is wary of adults.
facts: She uses she/her pronouns and is motivated by a need to protect her friends.
Lila is a top student in her class and has a knack for getting into restricted areas.
She is rumored to be part of a secret student group.

storyElements.name: The Eldridge Library
storyElements.role: A vast repository of knowledge, both mundane and magical.
storyElements.instructions: The library holds many secrets and can be a place to research the school's history and hidden magic.
facts: The library is rumored to have a hidden section accessible only by those who know the right incantation.
It is a favorite haunt of both students and faculty seeking solitude.
The librarian is known to be a strict guardian of the library's secrets.

storyElements.name: The Forbidden Forest
storyElements.role: A mysterious and dangerous area bordering the school grounds.
storyElements.instructions: The forest is home to magical creatures and ancient secrets. Entering it can be perilous.
facts: The forest is off-limits to students, but many have ventured in and never returned.
It is said to be alive with its own consciousness and can change its paths at will.
Strange lights and sounds are often reported emanating from its depths.

storyElements.name: The Ancient Grimoire
storyElements.role: A powerful book of spells and secrets hidden within the school.
storyElements.instructions: The grimoire can unlock powerful magic but requires a heavy price to use.
facts: The book is said to be bound in the skin of a mythical creature.
It contains spells that can alter reality, but misuse can lead to dire consequences.
Rumors suggest it is hidden in the headmaster's office.

storyElements.name: The Secret Society
storyElements.role: A clandestine group of students and faculty with their own agenda.
storyElements.instructions: The society can be both an ally and a threat, depending on your actions.
facts: Membership is by invitation only and requires a binding oath.
They are rumored to be involved in the disappearance of several students.
Their leader's identity is unknown, even to most members.

sharedOutcomes.question: Will the secrets of Eldridge Academy be revealed?

possibleResolutions.favorable: The secrets are revealed, leading to a positive change in the school's culture.
possibleResolutions.unfavorable: The secrets remain hidden, and the status quo is maintained.
possibleResolutions.mixed: Some secrets are revealed, but others remain hidden, leading to ongoing tension.

sharedOutcomes.resonance: Uncovering the secrets could change the power dynamics within the school and affect everyone's future.

sharedOutcomes.question: Can the hidden magic be controlled?

possibleResolutions.favorable: The magic is controlled and used to benefit the school.
possibleResolutions.unfavorable: The magic spirals out of control, causing chaos.
possibleResolutions.mixed: The magic is partially controlled, but at a cost.

sharedOutcomes.resonance: Controlling the magic is crucial for the safety of the school and its inhabitants.

sharedStats.name: School Reputation
effectOnPoints: -10 points in social challenges if Tarnished
+10 points in social challenges if Respected
+20 points in social challenges if Revered
narrativeImplications: Tarnished reputation leads to increased scrutiny from external authorities
Revered reputation attracts prestigious students and faculty
adjustmentsAfterThreads: Reputation improves after favorable resolutions in public threads
Reputation worsens after unfavorable resolutions involving scandals
sharedStats.tooltip: The overall perception of the school by external entities.

sharedStats.name: Magic Influence
effectOnPoints: Below 30% applies -15 points to magic-based challenges
Above 70% provides +15 points to magic-based challenges
sharedStats.optionsToSacrifice: Can channel magic influence (reducing it by 10%) for a +25 bonus in critical challenges
sharedStats.optionsToGainAsReward: Can focus on enhancing magic influence instead of pursuing immediate goals
narrativeImplications: Below 30% causes magical phenomena to become unstable
Above 90% creates a vibrant, almost magical atmosphere
adjustmentsAfterThreads: Decreases by 5% after each thread for each active magical threat
Increases by 20% after favorable resolutions in threads focused on magic control
sharedStats.tooltip: The level of magical influence within the school.

sharedStats.name: Student Suspicion
effectOnPoints: +1 point for every 10 suspicion points in investigative challenges
-10 points in stealth challenges for each 20 suspicion points due to increased visibility
sharedStats.optionsToSacrifice: Can risk increasing suspicion for a +20 bonus in critical challenges
sharedStats.optionsToGainAsReward: Can decrease suspicion by choosing to lay low instead of pursuing risky actions
narrativeImplications: High suspicion leads to increased surveillance by faculty
Low suspicion allows for more freedom of movement
adjustmentsAfterThreads: Suspicion increases after unfavorable resolutions in stealth threads
Suspicion decreases after favorable resolutions in threads focused on trust-building
sharedStats.tooltip: The level of suspicion among students regarding your activities.

playerStats.name: Teaching Skills
effectOnPoints: +15 points in teaching challenges when using a specific skill
-10 points in challenges outside your expertise
playerStats.optionsToSacrifice: Can sacrifice time on lesson planning for a +20 point boost in investigative challenges
playerStats.optionsToGainAsReward: Can focus on improving a teaching skill instead of pursuing immediate goals
narrativeImplications: Having all skills marks you as an exceptional educator
Lack of skills in certain areas may lead to classroom challenges
adjustmentsAfterThreads: Can gain a new skill after a favorable resolution of a thread focused on teaching
Skills may temporarily weaken after an unfavorable resolution in a thread where they were heavily relied upon
playerStats.tooltip: Your teaching abilities and areas of expertise.

playerStats.name: Trust with Students
effectOnPoints: Below 30% applies -15 points in interactions with students
Above 80% provides +10 points in challenges involving student cooperation
playerStats.optionsToSacrifice: Can risk lowering trust for a +20 bonus in critical challenges
playerStats.optionsToGainAsReward: Can choose to build trust instead of pursuing immediate goals
narrativeImplications: Below 30% causes students to be wary of you
Above 80% causes students to openly confide in you
adjustmentsAfterThreads: Regenerates 5% after each thread resolution for each positive interaction with students
Decreases by 10% after unfavorable resolutions in threads involving student trust
playerStats.tooltip: The level of trust students have in you.

playerStats.name: Faculty Standing
effectOnPoints: -10 points in faculty challenges if Outcast
+10 points in faculty challenges if Respected
+20 points in faculty challenges if Esteemed
narrativeImplications: Outcast status leads to isolation from faculty discussions
Esteemed status grants access to confidential information
adjustmentsAfterThreads: Standing improves after favorable resolutions in faculty threads
Standing worsens after unfavorable resolutions involving faculty conflicts
playerStats.tooltip: Your reputation and influence among the faculty.

characterSelectionIntroduction.title: Choose Your Path at Eldridge
characterSelectionIntroduction.text: Welcome to Eldridge Academy, where knowledge and mystery intertwine. As a new teacher, you must navigate the treacherous waters of academia. Remind me, which educator are you again?

outcomes.question: Can the player's reputation be restored?

possibleResolutions.favorable: The player's reputation is restored, earning respect from students and faculty.
possibleResolutions.unfavorable: The player's reputation remains tarnished, leading to isolation.
possibleResolutions.mixed: The player's reputation is partially restored, but some still harbor doubts.

outcomes.resonance: Restoring reputation is crucial for the player's career and influence at the school.

outcomes.question: Will the player form a strong alliance?

possibleResolutions.favorable: A strong alliance is formed, providing support in uncovering secrets.
possibleResolutions.unfavorable: Attempts to form an alliance fail, leaving the player isolated.
possibleResolutions.mixed: A tentative alliance is formed, but trust is fragile.

outcomes.resonance: Forming an alliance can provide crucial support in navigating the school's challenges.

possibleCharacterIdentities.name: Professor Elara
possibleCharacterIdentities.appearance: An elegant woman with sharp features and piercing blue eyes.

possibleCharacterIdentities.name: Dr. Marcus
possibleCharacterIdentities.appearance: A tall, bespectacled man with a thoughtful expression and graying hair.

possibleCharacterIdentities.name: Mx. Taylor
possibleCharacterIdentities.appearance: A non-binary individual with a warm smile and an eclectic fashion sense.

possibleCharacterBackgrounds.title: The Experienced Educator
possibleCharacterBackgrounds.fluffTemplate: {name} has dedicated {possessive} life to teaching, honing {possessive} skills to perfection. {Personal} reputation precedes {object}, but {personal} struggles to connect with the students.

possibleCharacterBackgrounds.title: The Student's Favorite
possibleCharacterBackgrounds.fluffTemplate: {name} has always had a knack for connecting with students, earning {possessive} trust and admiration. However, {personal} often finds {object} at odds with the faculty.

possibleCharacterBackgrounds.title: The Balanced Mentor
possibleCharacterBackgrounds.fluffTemplate: {name} is known for {possessive} balanced approach, managing to keep both students and faculty content. Yet, {personal} must tread carefully to maintain this balance.
